title: codereview pass 2: frequency agility pseudocode score weights inconsistent with main mitigate_and_transmit
description: Main TX pseudocode comment uses busy_time*0.6 + (PER*100)*0.4. New select_channel uses (busy*60 + per*40)/100 which is equivalent but should be unified and reference exact formula from rf_health or test vectors. Also, pseudocode mixes pseudocode with Rust array syntax; make language-agnostic. File: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:160-210. Tag: codereview. Linked to project-LICHEN-da2q.15.8.3.
close_reason: Resolved with pure pseudocode updates, SF selection complete with EMA/SNR table/load_factor, select_channel/now() definitions + hash unification, no language-specific syntax, CCP spec improvements. Ran lint/doctor, vectors referenced, 3 codereview passes (parallel subagents on pseudocode, definitions, Python CCP alignment). All tests pass. Closed.
